questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '5ecbde88-73a4-4f87-9d9a-24907d408f18' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '75e041da-f766-45de-a040-afedb0a5e9d7'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '5ecbde88-73a4-4f87-9d9a-24907d408f18'; delete from question_items where id = '5ecbde88-73a4-4f87-9d9a-24907d408f18';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
